metadata.title: Metadata Providers
metadata.description: Velox uses these services to automatically fetch movie posters, descriptions, ratings, and artwork. Most have built-in keys — you only need to add your own if you want.

tmdb.label: TMDb
tmdb.description: Primary source for movie & TV metadata, posters, and backdrops

omdb.label: OMDb
omdb.description: IMDb ratings, Rotten Tomatoes scores, and Metacritic scores

tvdb.label: TheTVDB
tvdb.description: Additional TV series metadata and episode information

subtitles.title: Subtitle Providers
subtitles.description: Velox can automatically search and download subtitles for your media from multiple sources.

opensubtitles.label: OpenSubtitles
opensubtitles.description: Largest subtitle database. API key + account optional for higher limits.

subdl.label: Subdl
subdl.description: Alternative subtitle provider with good coverage

deepl.label: DeepL Translation
deepl.description: Translate subtitles between languages (free tier: 500K chars/month)

autoDownload.label: Auto-download Languages
autoDownload.description: Automatically download subtitles in these languages during library scan

playback.title: Playback Settings
playback.description: Choose how Velox handles video playback when a device doesn't support the original format.

auto.label: Auto (Recommended)
auto.description: Automatically transcode when the device can't play the original format. Best compatibility.

directPlay.label: Direct Play Only
directPlay.description: Always serve the original file. Fastest, but may not work on all devices.

pretranscode.title: Pre-transcode
pretranscode.description: Encode your library in advance for instant playback — zero buffering. This uses disk space but provides the best viewing experience.

cinema.title: Cinema Mode
cinema.description: Play trailers before your movie starts — just like at the theater. Trailers are fetched automatically from TMDb.

maxTrailers.label: Max Trailers
maxTrailers.description: Number of trailers to play before the movie

summary.title: You're All Set!
summary.description: Here's a summary of your configuration. You can always change these later in Settings.
summary.addLibraryDescription: Now add a media library to start scanning your movies and TV shows.
summary.libraryAdded: Library added! Scanning will start automatically.
